src/App.tsx: Root application component. Sets up React Query, TooltipProvider, Toast notifications, and React Router. Defines all routes with Layout wrapper and nested pages.
src/main.tsx: Application entry point. Renders the App component into the root DOM element.
src/pages/Welcome.tsx: Landing page with centered layout, title, description, and CTA button. Uses Shadcn Button component.
src/layout/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper using React Router Outlet. Provides structure for sidebar/header placement. Full viewport height with scrollable main content.
src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function cn() for merging Tailwind CSS classes using clsx and tailwind-merge.
src/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and CSS variables for theming.
src/components/ui/: Shadcn UI primitives - DO NOT MODIFY. Use these components but don't edit them.
